title: ScheduledAgentItem
description: Represents a Warp Oz scheduled agent — a recurring agent run configured with a cron expression.

title.description: Human-readable title for the scheduled agent

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction used each time the schedule fires

cron.description: Cron expression defining the schedule (e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' for weekdays at 9am UTC)

enabled.description: Whether the schedule is currently active

created_at.description: Timestamp when the schedule was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the schedule was last updated

next_run_at.description: Timestamp of the next scheduled run

last_run_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent run triggered by this schedule

config.description: Agent configuration used for each triggered run

history.description: Recent execution history for this schedule
